title: Those Medieval Times
description: This Modpack adds a lot of new structures, bosses, weapons and a lot more.
body:
Those Medieval Times: Conquer the Unknown
Prepare yourself for a journey where every horizon hides a secret and every shadow guards a challenge. Those Medieval Times is not just a survival modpack; it is an invitation to explore a world reclaimed by nature and filled with the remnants of ancient civilizations.

In this world, your primary goal is to uncover the mysteries hidden within hundreds of new, uniquely generated structures. From towering sky-citadels and sprawling underground dungeons to haunted ruins lost in deep forests, the world is packed with loot to find and stories to uncover. You will never find a dull stretch of land—every biome is teeming with monumental architecture waiting for a pioneer like you.

But be warned: these treasures are not unguarded. To survive Those Medieval Times, you must test your mettle against colossal bosses and legendary adversaries. Each boss encounter is a true test of skill, requiring tactical planning, powerful gear, and nerves of steel.

Key Features:
The World of Ruins: Explore a massive variety of new structures, including fortresses, temples, and intricate dungeon systems.

Epic Boss Encounters: Face off against formidable entities with custom mechanics that turn every fight into a cinematic battle.

Legendary Loot: Conquer the most dangerous locations to find rare weapons and artifacts that will turn you into a medieval legend.

Dynamic Exploration: Enhanced world generation ensures that every journey feels fresh, rewarding, and visually stunning.

The question isn't just whether you can survive—it's whether you can conquer. Grab your gear, sharpen your sword, and prepare to face the giants of Those Medieval Times!
